GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [d_year@0 ASC NULLS LAST, ext_price@3 DESC, brand_id@1 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec: expr=[d_year@0 ASC NULLS LAST, ext_price@3 DESC, brand_id@1 ASC NULLS LAST], fetch=100
    GpuProjectExec: expr=[d_year@0 as d_year, i_brand_id@2 as brand_id, i_brand@1 as brand, sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)@3 as ext_price]
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[d_year, i_brand, i_brand_id], aggr=[sum(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=17895697
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_year@0, i_brand@1, i_brand_id@2], 8), input_partitions=8

              GpuProjectExec: expr=[d_year@2 as d_year, ss_ext_sales_price@3 as ss_ext_sales_price, i_brand_id@0 as i_brand_id, i_brand@1 as i_brand]
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=17895697
                  GpuHashJoinExec: join_type=Inner, on=[(i_item_sk@0, ss_item_sk@1)], projection=[1, 2, 3, 5]
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=17895697
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_item_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=17895697

                              GpuScanExec: batch_size=17895697
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=17895697
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([ss_item_sk@1], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=17895697

                            GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=17895697
                              GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([d_date_sk@0], 8), input_partitions=8

                                      GpuScanExec: batch_size=17895697

--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=2008
